rules.name: unsafe block
rules.message: unsafe block bypasses Rust safety guarantees — document safety invariants in a SAFETY comment

rules.name: .unwrap() in non-test code
rules.message: .unwrap() will panic on None/Err — use ? operator, expect(), or match in production code

rules.name: panic! in library code
rules.message: panic! in library code — return Result<T, E> instead for recoverable errors

rules.name: todo!/unimplemented! macro
rules.message: todo!/unimplemented! will panic at runtime — implement or use a proper error type

rules.name: .clone() on large type
rules.message: .clone() on heap-allocated type — consider borrowing with & or Arc for shared ownership

rules.name: Raw pointer dereference
rules.message: Raw pointer dereference requires unsafe — verify memory safety and aliasing rules
